title: Open CoT RFC 0017 — Cognitive pipeline Safety & Sandboxing Configuration
description: Defines sandbox policies that constrain cognitive pipeline behavior at runtime: which tools are permitted, step/branch limits, and memory access controls.

allowed_tools.description: Tool names the cognitive pipeline may invoke. Use ["*"] to allow all.

blocked_tools.description: Tool names explicitly denied regardless of allowed_tools.

max_steps.description: Maximum number of loop iterations before forced stop.

max_branches.description: Maximum number of concurrent reasoning branches.

memory_acl.description: Access control list mapping role or requester IDs to permission arrays.
